headline: These 2 Stocks Called Best Way To Play Industrial Automation Trend
summary: As the industrial automation trend continues, the best near-term plays for investors are in machine vision, an analyst says.

headline: Global RFID Antenna Market to Reach USD 0.42 Billion by 2032 with 10.1% CAGR
summary: The global RFID antenna market, valued at USD 0.24 billion in 2026, is projected to reach USD 0.42 billion by 2032, growing at a 10.1% CAGR. Airport & baggage handling is set to experience the highest growth due to smart airport infrastructure investments and the need for real-time baggage tracking. Fixed deployment dominates in tracking environments like warehouses and retail. The Asia Pacific leads in market share, propelled by digitalization and Industry 4.0 initiatives.
